nav.search_empty: No matching products yet. Try another keyword.

about.title: PetQuirky is a small independent pet shop for curious pet people.
about.subtitle: PetQuirky is operated by an individual seller, not a company. Product choices, policies, and support are kept clear and direct for European customers.
about.card_one_text: We would rather select a few genuinely useful pieces than flood the shop with interchangeable listings.
about.card_two_text: Prices, shipping expectations, and policies are shaped around a European customer experience from day one.
about.card_three_text: Questions about orders, shipping, returns, privacy, or products are handled directly through our support email.

blog.title: PetQuirky Blog
blog.subtitle: Tips, guides, and practical stories for modern pet households.

contact.title: Contact PetQuirky
contact.subtitle: Questions about orders, shipping, returns, or a product you saw in the journal? Write to us directly.
contact.success: Thanks! Your message is on its way to PetQuirky.
contact.error: We could not send your message. Please try again.
contact.invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
contact.message_placeholder: Tell us how we can help with your order, shipping, returns, or product question.

cookie.title: We use cookies to keep PetQuirky running smoothly.
cookie.description: Necessary cookies help core site functions. You can also choose optional analytics and marketing cookies.
cookie.preferences_description: Choose which cookies you want to allow. Necessary cookies are always enabled.
cookie.necessary_description: Required for locale routing, cart behavior, and essential site functions.
cookie.analytics_description: Helps us understand how visitors use the site.

footer.individual_seller: PetQuirky is operated by an individual seller, not a company.

home.hero_subtitle: Discover quirky accessories for every companion, from playful cats to curious reptiles.
home.featured_subtitle: The most loved items from our community of discerning pet parents.
home.newsletter_description: Get early access to new arrivals, care guides, and pet-friendly tech insights.
home.newsletter_success: Thanks for subscribing. We'll keep you posted.
home.newsletter_error: We could not save your subscription right now. Please try again.
home.newsletter_invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
home.newsletter_already: You're already subscribed with this email.

products.page_subtitle: Curating the finest essentials for your quirky companions ({count} products)
products.empty_description: Try another category, pet type, or search term.

auth.login_subtitle: Log in to your PetQuirky account
auth.register_subtitle: Track orders and save your shipping address
auth.forgot_password_help: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
auth.reset_password_help: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.invalid_credentials: Please enter a valid email and password.
auth.invalid_registration: Please complete all fields and confirm the terms.
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters long.
auth.accept_terms_required: Please accept the Privacy Policy and Terms of Service.
auth.confirmation_sent: Your account was created. Please check your email to confirm it before signing in.
auth.reset_sent: If this email exists, a reset link has been sent.

account.orders_subtitle: Manage and track your recent pet quirky finds.
account.need_help_body: Our small team can help with shipping updates, returns, and product questions.
account.order_detail_help: Review your shipping details and purchased items here.
account.empty_description: Your completed checkout history will appear here as soon as you place your first order.
account.guest_email: Sign in to sync your orders across devices.
account.order_missing_description: We could not find this order in your account.
account.profile_help: This profile is synced from your current Supabase session.
account.no_saved_address: No saved shipping address yet. Complete checkout once and we'll keep it here for you.
account.profile_saved: Your profile changes have been saved.
account.incomplete_address: Please complete the full shipping address or leave it empty.
account.email_locked: Email updates are managed through Supabase authentication and are currently read-only here.

checkout.empty_description: Your cart is empty. Add a few clever essentials before checking out.
checkout.legal: By placing your order, you agree to our policies:
checkout.card: Pay with Debit or Credit Card
checkout.secure: Payment is processed securely by PayPal. PetQuirky does not store your PayPal login or card details.
checkout.paypal_error: We could not start your PayPal payment. Please try again.
checkout.processing: Complete shipping details before continuing to payment.
checkout.login_required: Please sign in before starting payment.
checkout.auth_required_body: PetQuirky checkout is account-based. Log in or create an account to continue to secure PayPal payment; your cart and shipping details will stay here.
checkout.payment_pending_description: Please keep this window open while we securely finalize your order with PayPal.
checkout.payment_success_description: Your order is confirmed and we're preparing your confirmation page now.
checkout.success_subtitle: We've received your order and will handle it as an individual seller.
checkout.success_email_notice: We've sent a confirmation to your email.
checkout.success_email_pending: Your order is confirmed, but the confirmation email is still pending. You can review the order from your account.
checkout.success_delivery_notice: Estimated delivery is usually 5-10 business days after order processing.
checkout.success_internal_notice: The order was saved successfully, but one internal notification still needs attention.
checkout.success_account_prompt: You can review your order details and saved shipping address from your account anytime.

cart.title: Your Cart
cart.taxes_notice: Taxes and shipping are shown during checkout where applicable. You may request a return within 14 days after delivery.
